spoken: Four hundred and twenty-seven elements on a live Amazon product page. Every button, every link, every dropdown. The sieve found them all. No LLM. No vision model. Zero tokens.
Amazon dot product-title is readable. Amazon dot search-amazon is typable. Amazon dot denim-color-option is clickable. Structured. Deterministic. Named.
Watch — the agent clicks the color option. The page responds. Clicks the rating button. The reviews expand. Real interaction, zero guessing.
Now a state park reservation system. Live.
A hundred and fifty-three elements. Every date cell in the availability calendar. Every dropdown. Every map control. All named.
Campsite dot park-name is readable. Campsite dot date-range-selector is clickable. Campsite dot availability-oh-four-nineteen is clickable. Even the map zoom controls are named.
The sieve sees everything. The glossary names everything. The agent knows everything. LeftGlove plus OpenClaw. Deterministic page understanding for AI agents.
